## Improvements

- **Speaker labels are re-checked after every live meeting.** When a live meeting is saved, the on-device voice pipeline re-runs diarization over the full recording and quietly fixes the label drift that streaming diarization accumulates over long meetings — names and colors you assigned stay attached; only mislabelled lines move.

- **The first caption appears without the dictionary stall.** The Simplified→Traditional dictionary now loads at startup instead of on the first transcript event, which used to delay the opening caption of every meeting (and the first dictation) by the whole dictionary parse.

- **Voice typing pastes noticeably faster.** The app now knows the exact moment the transcription session has flushed its last words and pastes right after, instead of waiting for the transcript to "go quiet" — typically 350–500 ms faster from key release to text in your app. The old wait remains as a safety net for providers that never close the stream.

- **Live delivery gauges react faster.** Prosody updates now stream ~6–7× per second (was 2×), and the pace read uses a tighter 2-second window — the pace meter now reacts to tempo changes about a second sooner and clears sooner after you stop talking. Coaching nudge frequency is unchanged.
